1735140.name: Pushy Worm
1735140.description:
In Pushy Worm, you play as daddy worm who leaves home to collect fruit for his 3 hungry kids. The puzzles appear simple at first but gradually get more challenging and will make you consider your every move. Your spatial awareness and forward planning skills will be fully tested in this cute but deceptively tricky puzzle game.

Features:
  • Control a 3 block worm with Sokoban style movement and physics
  • Climb fences and push/stack/carry items to solve the various puzzles
  • Avoid obstacles such as spikes and use bombs to blow up terrain and forge new paths for daddy worm to traverse through
  • Includes multiple theme-based worlds with non-linear paths through the levels
  • Unlimited undo allows you to experiment with different solutions without needing to restart the level from scratch if a mistake is made
